prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9f8de559`.
codex_response:
Implemented `9f8de559` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f8de559/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f8de559/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f8de559/generator.py#L111).

The rule is: the lone `2` and the adjacent straight run of `6`s form an arrow; extend from the `2` away from the `6`s through the `7` region and recolor the first non-`7` cell hit to `7`. The Opus hint matched the official examples and was usable; the Sonnet file had no entry for this task, so there was nothing to reject and no `notes.md` was needed. I did not add any new primitive.

The generator stays close to the official family: fixed 14x14 boards, one large rectangular `7` field, blocky outer `5/8/9` border bands with anchored rectangular patches, and a 4-cell `6` tail plus `2` tip in cardinal or diagonal orientations. Validation passed end to end: `5/5` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples, and the provided test case in the puzzle JSON also matches the verifier.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f8de559/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f8de559/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f8de559/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f8de559/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f8de559/previews/preview_03.png).
